value.found_quote: You can run Codex as an MCP server and connect it from other MCP clients (for example, an agent built with the [OpenAI Agents SDK MCP integration](https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/agents/integrations-observability#mcp)).
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes running Codex as an MCP server with the `codex mcp-server` command, allowing other MCP clients to connect, which directly substantiates the claim. It is presented as a current, functional capability.
